theme: Do you think competition is healthy or harmful for

sentences.english: Do you think competition is healthy or harmful for society?
I believe healthy competition is essential for progress but excessive competition can be destructive.
sentences.korean: 건강한 경쟁은 발전에 필수적이지만 과도한 경쟁은 파괴적일 수 있다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Competition drives innovation because companies and individuals push themselves to be better than their rivals.
sentences.korean: 경쟁은 혁신을 이끌어요. 기업과 개인이 경쟁자보다 더 나아지려고 노력하니까요.

sentences.english: Without competition there would be little motivation to improve products services or personal skills.
sentences.korean: 경쟁 없이는 제품 서비스 개인 기술을 개선할 동기가 거의 없을 거예요.

sentences.english: However when competition becomes too intense it can lead to burnout unethical behavior and a win-at-all-costs mentality that harms everyone.
sentences.korean: 하지만 경쟁이 너무 치열해지면 번아웃 비윤리적 행동 모두에게 해가 되는 무조건 승리 사고방식으로 이어질 수 있어요.

sentences.english: The ideal is to compete against yourself — constantly trying to be better than you were yesterday.
sentences.korean: 이상적인 것은 자신과 경쟁하는 거예요 — 어제의 자신보다 더 나아지려고 끊임없이 노력하는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do you think competition is healthy or harmful for
